text: There’s a gentle hum of conversation from the group behind the glass. I feel like an observer—separated, yet curious. The room where I stand is quieter, almost clinical, but through that wall, ideas seem to be blossoming. The colorful exhibit beside me invites contemplation: the world of R+D, of innovation and restless questioning. I feel a pull to cross thresholds, to join the interplay of dialogue and discovery, yet I also value this pause at the boundary, where thought takes root in anticipation.
